design_philosophy.core_concept: Institutional Grade Finance meets Cyberpunk Precision
key_principles: Density is Luxury: Information density should be high but legible.
Neon indicates Action: Color is never decorative, it is functional signal.
Glass is Crystal: Surfaces are deep, blurry, and sharp-edged.
Motion is Data: Animations should feel like live data feeds, not bounces.

usage_rules.numbers: ALWAYS use JetBrains Mono for prices, percentages, and trade values.

grid_system.dashboard: Mode B: High Density. Use grid-cols-12. Gap-4. Full height children.
grid_system.landing: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetrical. Gap-8 to Gap-12.

layout_and_spacing.container_rules: All bordered containers must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.

buttons.style: Sharp edges or minimal rounded-sm (2px). Technical look.
buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.danger: bg-red-600/10 border border-red-500 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 font-mono
buttons.success: bg-green-500/10 border border-green-400 text-green-400 hover:bg-green-500 hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 font-mono

inputs.style: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500/50 rounded-sm font-mono text-sm

effects.name: Tracing Beam
effects.description: Moving gradient border for active cards.
effects.css_class: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:p-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-indigo-500 before:to-transparent before:content-[''] before:animate-border-trace

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients for dark backgrounds. Use solid dark colors with noise or subtle radial glows.
Text contrast MUST meet WCAG AA (4.5:1). Avoid dark grey text on black backgrounds.
Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Ensure 'Made with Emergent' branding remains hidden.
Use 'recharts' for data visualization with custom neon stroke colors.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building the UI for 'SignalBeast Pro'. It is a serious tool for traders. Do not make it look like a toy. Use the provided colors and fonts strictly.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard_implementation: The dashboard must be dense. Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy. Use real-time data simulation visuals (flashing prices).
instructions_to_main_agent.signals_page: Highlight 'Buy' signals with Green neon glow and 'Sell' with Red neon glow. Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect on the highest confidence signal.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use the 'TradingView' style. Dark background, Green/Red candles, no grid lines, minimal axes.
instructions_to_main_agent.journal: Use a clean table layout with 'JetBrains Mono' for all numerical entries.
